data.title: Ilkka Oyj: Acquisition of own shares on 10 April 2026
data.description: Ilkka Oyj announced on April 10, 2026, that they have acquired their own shares. The acquisition took place at 7:00 p.m. EEST.

data.title: City College of San Francisco (CCSF) Invites You to Its Annual Open House Event, CCSF Connect 2026
data.description: On April 10, 2026, the City College of San Francisco (CCSF) announced their upcoming event, CCSF Connect 2026, inviting San Francisco Bay Area residents to attend. The event will take place on April 18th from 11:00am to 2:00pm at the Student Success Center building located on CCSF Ocean Campus. This will be the largest annual open house event hosted by CCSF.

data.title: NRD, LLC Announces Release of Solid State Nuclear Battery Power Cell Designed for 100 Years of Ultra-Low Power Operation
data.description: A company called NRD, LLC, based in Grand Island, New York, revealed on April 10, 2026, the launch of its NBV series. This series consists of Nickel-63-fueled solid-state betavoltaic nuclear battery power cells. The cells are designed to deliver continuous and maintenance-free power. NRD is a global manufacturer specializing in advanced nuclear materials.

data.title: FROM NEW YORK TO CHICAGO: ASTI WEEK RETURNS FOR ITS SECOND EDITION WITH A CITYWIDE CELEBRATION OF WINE AND CUISINE
data.description: The popular Asti Week event, which originated in New York, is coming to Chicago this year from April 20 to April 26, 2026. Sixteen restaurants throughout the city will participate in the week-long culinary celebration. This expansion marks a significant milestone for the event, offering residents and visitors in Chicago a chance to experience the diverse offerings from participating restaurants.

data.title: FERRARI N.V.: COMPLETION OF THE FIRST TRANCHE AND ANNOUNCEMENT OF THE SECOND TRANCHE OF THE MULTI-YEAR SHARE REPURCHASE PROGRAM
data.description: Maranello, Italy, April 10, 2026 - Ferrari N.V. disclosed that they have acquired common shares worth Euro 250 million as part of their share buyback program initiated on December 16, 2025. This purchase marks the First Tranche of a broader buyback plan totaling around Euro 3.5 billion anticipated to be completed by 2030, in alignment with the announcements made during the 2025 Capital Markets Day. The company will continue to acquire additional common shares daily through the Euronext Milan (EXM) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) as part of this ongoing initiative.

data.title: Stevia Sugar Blends Market to Reach USD 125 Billion by 2033 Amid Rising Health Awareness, Sugar Reduction Initiatives, and Expanding Demand for Natural Sweeteners - Market Research Intellect
data.description: The Stevia Sugar Blends Market is experiencing growth as a result of growing consumer knowledge about health risks associated with sugar, including diabetes, obesity, and cardiovascular diseases. The rising demand for natural sweetening options with fewer calories is driving the food and beverage industry. This trend is reflected in significant market numbers, with a notable increase in sales and consumption of stevia sugar blends.

data.title: Hong Kong Greenlights Stablecoins: HSBC, StanChart JV Win First Licenses
data.description: HSBC Holdings plc saw a slight increase in its shares on Friday following the approval of new stablecoin issuer licenses in Hong Kong. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority granted licenses to Anchorpoint Financial Limited, a joint venture between Standard Chartered PLC, and The Hongkong and Shanghai Banking Corporation Limited, under a new regulatory framework. This development signifies progress in the oversight of digital assets, with Hong Kong aiming to regulate stablecoin operations to promote innovation while ensuring user and market protections. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
Only 1 oil tanker has passed through the Strait of Hormuz today - CNN citing shipping data

data.title: July brings a 43% drop in Worldcoin's daily token unlocks from 5.1M to 2.9M on July 24, 2026, easing supply pressure.
data.description: Starting July 24, 2026, Worldcoin will decrease their daily token unlocks from 5.1 million to 2.9 million WLD tokens. This change aims to alleviate selling pressure on the token, potentially aiding its performance in the market.

data.title: Circle introduces complete interoperability stack for $110B+ USDC crosschain network, supporting multiple assets and achieving $400M monthly volume with sub-500ms settlement. (Read More)
data.description: Circle has expanded its Centre Consortium Technology Platform (CCTP) beyond the stablecoin USDC to now include support for EURC, USYC, and third-party assets. The platform's gateway has achieved an impressive monthly volume of $400 million with settlement times of less than 500 milliseconds across 12 blockchain networks. This move signifies Circle's commitment to broadening its offerings and enhancing the efficiency of transactions within the digital asset space.

data.title: War with Iran hampers significant oil flow from Persian Gulf, causing more impact than reflected in prices.
data.description: The ongoing conflict with Iran in the Persian Gulf region has caused a significant decrease in the export of oil. Despite this, the widely monitored oil prices do not accurately reflect the extent of the disruption the situation has caused.

data.title: Treasury Secretary and Fed Chairman express concerns over Anthropic's AI, summoning banking leaders to address risks.
data.description: The Secretary of the Treasury and the Chairman of the Federal Reserve have called upon banking executives for a meeting to address concerns regarding the possible systemic risks posed by Anthropic's latest model.

data.title: Some companies, including Delta Air Lines and Amazon, are raising prices due to the Iran War, citing increased energy costs.
data.description: Several major companies, including Delta Air Lines, Amazon, and the United States Postal Service, are increasing prices in response to heightened energy costs linked to the conflict in Iran. This decision may affect consumers as they navigate the market with potentially higher expenses. The price hikes are anticipated to offset the impact of rising fuel prices and other related expenses brought about by the ongoing situation in Iran. This move by the companies underscores the economic ripple effects of geopolitical instability, with customers likely to face increased costs for essential services and goods in the near future. The specific percentage of price hikes has not been disclosed by the companies at this time.

data.title: Europe readies for rising inflation as investors anticipate interest rate hikes by ECB and BoE in 2022.
data.description: Investors are showing confidence in the possibility of interest rates being increased by the European Central Bank and the Bank of England within the current year.

data.title: March saw a surge in U.S. inflation due to rising energy costs, with Consumer Price Index increasing the most since June 2022.
data.description: Rising energy expenses resulted in the largest monthly surge in the Consumer Price Index since June 2022, during the peak of the post-pandemic inflation crisis.

data.title: Investors cautious as ceasefire talks on Iran face obstacles; eyes on US inflation report.
data.description: Investors are closely monitoring the temporary halt in the conflict with Iran, which is encountering various obstacles. The release of U.S. government statistics on inflation is being eagerly anticipated.
